title: How to Make Your AI Agents Work Better (With Context Hygiene)
summary: Jordan Urbs explains context hygiene as a three-layer framework (Skills, Harnesses, Hygiene) for maintaining AI agent state and behavior across conversations. The approach includes tools like CLAUDE.md for behavioral configuration, lazy loading to preserve context window space, and multi-agent orchestration to prevent context degradation in production workflows.
